package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for optional_tx_nil_parameter_on_repository_api: Repository APIs that use optional `tx *gorm.DB` parameters instead of explicit unit-of-work contracts.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule105NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule105NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule105NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario105Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule105NegativeService, input Rule105NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
